title: oritrophium marahuacense
intro: Oritrophium marahuacense, also known as the Marahuacense or Tithonia, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to Venezuela and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and saponins, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Oritrophium marahuacense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues.
